summary: Tested Smart Evidence Scoring V2 - Temporal + Geographic Consistency. All 20 backend tests passed (1 skipped - no QR evidence). All 16 frontend UI tests passed. The smart scoring correctly identifies: temporal consistency (too_early/too_late/valid), geographic consistency (close/nearby/far/incoherent), and combines them for smart confidence scoring. Forward geocoding caches appointment coordinates, reverse geocoding provides address_label for check-in GPS.
passed_tests: Backend: Forward geocoding - appointment has geocoded coordinates (PASSED)
Backend: Forward geocoding - original address preserved (PASSED)
Backend: Reverse geocoding - evidence has address_label (PASSED)
Backend: Temporal consistency - too_early detected for 69h early check-in (PASSED)
Backend: Temporal consistency - temporal_flag in aggregation (PASSED)
Backend: Geographic consistency - incoherent detected for 689km distance (PASSED)
Backend: Geographic consistency - distance_km and distance_meters calculated (PASSED)
Backend: Geographic consistency - geographic_flag in aggregation (PASSED)
Backend: Smart confidence - low confidence for too_early + incoherent (PASSED)
Backend: Smart confidence - weak strength for bad consistency (PASSED)
Backend: Evidence enriched data - all fields present (PASSED)
Backend: Check-in status returns smart fields (PASSED)
Backend: QR check-in includes temporal consistency (SKIPPED - no QR evidence)
Backend: GPS check-in includes all smart fields (PASSED)
Backend: Strength degraded by temporal too_early (PASSED)
Backend: Strength degraded by geographic incoherent (PASSED)
Frontend: Temporal detail 'avant le début du RDV' visible (PASSED)
Frontend: Paris in address (reverse geocoding) visible (PASSED)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test appointment c053871f with geocoded Cannes location and existing evidence showing Paris GPS (689km away, 69h early) correctly scored as 'low' confidence with 'weak' strength.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart Evidence Scoring V2 fully tested. Key features: 1) Temporal window: valid = RDV_start - 2h to RDV_end + 1h, outside = too_early/too_late. 2) Geographic thresholds: close (<500m), nearby (<5km), far (<50km), incoherent (>50km). 3) Smart confidence: combines source type + temporal + geographic. 4) Forward geocoding via Nominatim caches coordinates in appointment doc (location_latitude, location_longitude, location_geocoded=true). 5) Reverse geocoding adds address_label to derived_facts. 6) Aggregation strength degraded by worst temporal/geographic flags. Frontend displays: 'Hors fenêtre (trop tôt)', 'Lieu incohérent', 'Preuve faible', 'Confiance faible', address_label, distance_km with consistency label, map link.

verified_features.temporal_consistency: assess_temporal_consistency() returns valid/too_early/too_late/valid_late with hours_offset and detail
verified_features.smart_confidence: compute_smart_confidence() combines source + temporal + geographic for high/medium/low
verified_features.forward_geocoding: geocode_address() via Nominatim, cached in appointment.location_latitude/longitude
verified_features.strength_degradation: Strength degraded to weak for incoherent or days-early check-ins
verified_features.ui_distance_display: Distance du lieu du RDV: {distance_km} km — {consistency_label}
verified_features.ui_map_link: Voir sur la carte link to Google Maps

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked. Using real Nominatim (OpenStreetMap) for geocoding with rate limits (1 req/sec). Geocoded coordinates are cached in appointment doc.
